name: GAKI

abilities.name: Ravenous Wraith
abilities.text: When this model is summoned, it may discard a card to summon another Gaki within 1" of it.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (+) actions may not be reduced this way.

actions.name: Sharp Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Gang Up
triggers.text: When resolving, deal +1 damage for each other ally the target is engaged with, to a maximum of +2.

actions.name: Obscene Feast
actions.effects: Remove all enemy markers within range. This model heals 1 for each marker removed in this way.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 3, derived from 'Minion (3)' characteristic
STN: 5 visible below the artwork, likely indicating Stone Number or similar game mechanic
